tuning: E A D G B E
content:
This is one on my favorites i did
it by ear for guys play with this
 one but if your a girl i find it
better to play transposed down
twice with the capo fourth.
ignore my chord refrences below
if youre going to transpose

[ch]Esus4[/ch] :022200
[ch]E[/ch]     :022100
[ch]Esus2[/ch] :024400

[ch]Asus2[/ch] :x02200
[ch]Asus4[/ch] :x00230

chord change down hold chord
change down down slap chord change
